title: [Snyk Code] Hardcoded Non-Cryptographic Secret
description:

**Project:** `AnthusAI/Plexus`

**Location:** line 71, column 9 to line 71, column 37
**Classes:** CWE-CWE-547
### Snippet (dashboard/amplify/functions/taskDispatcher/resource.ts:69-73)

```
  71 |         CELERY_AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY: celeryAwsSecretAccessKey,
  72 |         CELERY_AWS_REGION_NAME: celeryAwsRegion,
  73 |         CELERY_RESULT_BACKEND_TEMPLATE: celeryResultBackendTemplate
```
